scene.message: Nanjo: ...{wait_fr:60}Wait, {ctl0f:1}.{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Why, Nanjo?{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: ...Don't mind it.{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Tch!{wait_fr:60} So he says.{nl} Go on, {ctl0f:1}.{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Kandori, you{nl} filthy schemer...{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: ...{wait_fr:60}A filthy bastard,{nl} just like his father...{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: {ctl08:65281}Be bad if something{nl} happened, so be care-{waitkey}Want me to switch in?{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: {ctl0f:1}~{nl} Hurry it up.{waitkey}{ret}
Set the Half Compact?{nl} {ctl0e:0}{ret}
Mark: Wh-what's going on?{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Kandori must be{nl} laughing his head off.{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: What does this mean?!{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: There was no other{nl} way to reach him.{waitkey}{ret}
The door is shut tight.{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: That Kido's{nl} probably steaming mad.{waitkey}{ret}
